name: multiagent
description: MultiAgent desktop app conventions for Codex terminal sessions: write file paths so the in-app terminal turns them into clickable links, plus terminal UX conventions.

interface.longDescription: Conventions for working inside the MultiAgent desktop app's terminal: write file paths with a directory segment or absolute path so the app turns them into clickable links, use path:line to jump to a line, and related terminal UX behavior.
